item.description:
What's New

  • Continuity Camera - Improved detection and filtering of Continuity Camera microphones.
  • Repeat Dictation - You can now ask the speaking agent to repeat or paste your latest voice dictation.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where system and per-app audio could be silently dropped during meeting recordings.
  • Improved the stability of auxiliary panels to prevent display glitches during show and hide actions.

Bug Fixes

  • Improved overlay visibility and positioning when switching between fullscreen apps and different Spaces.
  • Fixed an issue that caused slow motion audio or connection failures when using AirPods.
  • Improved reliability of audio capture when the selected microphone is disconnected.
  • Improved stability of AirPods audio processing and network monitoring during disconnections.

What's New

  • Out of Credits Notification - The application now displays a clear, user-friendly message when credits run out, rather than a generic server error.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue that could cause the application to freeze or hang when starting or using dictation.
  • Fixed overlay panel display behavior when using full-screen applications.
  • Fixed an issue with the meeting recording animation.
